summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KHAYA real estate premium website. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. 140 units with interactive floor plans, filters, and contact form fully functional.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Hero section loads with facade image and KHAYA branding
Navigation with logo and contact button functional
Explore availability button scrolls to building explorer
Floor plan displays with 10 apartment units per floor
Unit modal opens with price, area, bedrooms, bathrooms, view, delivery info
Filters work for view (Este/Oeste), status (Disponible/Reservado/Vendido/Bloqueado), type (Central/Esquinero)
Contact form opens from nav and from unit modal
Legend shows correct statistics (66 Disponible, 39 Reservado, 26 Vendido, 9 Bloqueado)
API /api/contact accepts POST requests and stores data
All backend endpoints (health, stats, filters) working
Unit details modal displays all required information
